description:
Track countries, visualize your progress, and explore where you’re going next.
CountryCount is the ultimate companion for keeping track of all the countries you have visited. Visualize your personal travel progress with detailed statistics and insights. Explore new destinations and effortlessly plan your next adventure.

Key Features:
 * Track: Mark 193 UN states with optional dates.
 * Analyze: Get beautiful statistics on your travel progress.
 * Discover: Filter the world by different metrics.
 * Design: Enjoy a state-of-the-art Material Design 3 experience.
 * Security: No ads. No tracking. Works entirely offline.
